name: product-film-marketplace
description: Marketplace for the product-film plugin — a self-playing prototype you record to get your product demo video.

plugins.name: product-film
plugins.description: Build a self-playing product demo from a single HTML file: a faithful replica of your product that navigates itself — cinematic cursor, kinetic captions, zoom/spotlight, countdown, loop. You just record the screen. Ideal for Product Hunt launches, landing pages, and YouTube demo videos.
